---
title: "Fig 1"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(binom)
library(dplyr)
library(flavipack)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

source("./R_scripts/cohort_utils.R")
source("./R_scripts/CPC.R")
source("./R_scripts/follow_up.R")
source("./R_scripts/KFCS.R")
source("./R_scripts/NMC.R")
source("./R_scripts/plots.R")

type_lvls <- c(str_glue("DENV-{1:4}"), "Untyped/Mixed", "Subclinical")

cohort_lvls <- c("NMC", "CPC", "KFCS")
```

# Fig 1A

```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 3}
NMC_infection_df <- NMC_get_infection_df(1.18) |> filter(is_inf == 1)

NMC_symp_infection <- NMC_infection_df |> filter(PCR_infection == 1)

NMC_symp_infection$serotype |> table()

count_inf_df <- NMC_infection_df |> 
  select(subjectNo, collected_year, serotype) |> 
  mutate(serotype = ifelse(serotype == "Unknown", "Untyped/Mixed", serotype),
         serotype = factor(serotype, levels = type_lvls)) |> 
  group_by(collected_year, serotype) |> 
  summarise(n_inf   = n(),
            .groups = "drop")

n_sub_inf <- count_inf_df |> filter(serotype == "Subclinical") |> 
  pull(n_inf) |> sum()

fig_1A <- plot_1A(count_inf_df)

fig_1A
```

# Fig 1B

```{r}
CPC_infection_df <- CPC_get_infection_df() |> filter(is_inf)

CPC_symp_infection <- CPC_infection_df |> filter(PCR)

table(CPC_symp_infection$serotype)

count_inf_df <- CPC_infection_df |> 
  mutate(collected_year = year(collection_date),
         serotype       = str_replace(serotype, "DEN", "DENV-")) |> 
  select(subject_id, collected_year, serotype) |> 
  group_by(collected_year, serotype) |> 
  summarise(n_inf   = n(),
            .groups = "drop") |> 
  complete(
    collected_year,
    serotype = factor(type_lvls, levels = type_lvls),
    fill = list(n_inf = 0)) |> 
  mutate(serotype = factor(serotype, levels = type_lvls))

CPC_n_sub_inf <- count_inf_df |> filter(serotype == "Subclinical") |> 
  pull(n_inf) |> sum()

fig_1B <- plot_1B(count_inf_df)

fig_1B
```

# Fig 1C

```{r}
KFCS_infection_df <- KFCS_get_infection_df() |> filter(is_inf)

alt_infection_df <- KFCS_get_infection_df() |> filter(is_alt_inf)

KFCS_symp_infection <- KFCS_infection_df |> filter(PCR)

table(KFCS_symp_infection$serotype)

count_inf_df <- KFCS_infection_df |> 
  mutate(collected_year = year(end_interval)) |> 
  select(subjectNo, collected_year, serotype) |> 
  mutate(serotype = factor(serotype, 
                           levels = type_lvls)) |> 
  group_by(collected_year, serotype) |> 
  summarise(n_inf   = n(),
            .groups = "drop")

KFCS_n_sub_inf <- count_inf_df |> filter(serotype == "Subclinical") |> 
  pull(n_inf) |> sum()

fig_1C <- plot_1C(count_inf_df)

fig_1C
```

# Fig 1D

```{r}
breaks <- c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, Inf)
labels <- c("0-9","10-19", "20-29",
            "30-39", "40-49", "50-59", "60+")

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CPC_age_inf_df  <- CPC_get_prob_inf_at_age() |> filter(age >= 2) 

CPC_age_bin_inf <- CPC_age_inf_df |>
    mutate(age_bin = cut(age, 
                       breaks = breaks,
                       levels = levels)) |> 
  group_by(age_bin) |> 
  summarise(n_infections  = sum(n_infections),
            n_individuals = sum(n_individuals)) |> 
  mutate(pct    = n_infections / n_individuals,
         cohort = "CPC")

CPC_age_bin_inf  <- CPC_age_bin_inf |> add_binomial_CI() |> 
  mutate(country = "PHL")
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
NMC_age_inf_df  <- NMC_get_prob_inf_at_age() |> filter(age >= 2) 

NMC_age_bin_inf <- NMC_age_inf_df |> 
  group_infections_in_bins(breaks, levels)

NMC_age_bin_inf <- NMC_age_bin_inf |> add_binomial_CI() |> 
  mutate(cohort = "NMC",
         country = "PHL")
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
age_bin_inf <- bind_rows(CPC_age_bin_inf, NMC_age_bin_inf) |> 
    complete(age_bin, 
    cohort = factor(cohort_lvls, levels = cohort_lvls),
    fill   = list(pct = NA)) 

# Needs Inference.Rmd to be run
pred_df <- readRDS("./saved_objects/inference/one_dataset/pred.rds")[[2]] |> 
  mutate(cohort = "CPC") |> 
  rename(age_bin = age)

fig_1D <- plot_1D(pred_df, age_bin_inf)
fig_1D
```

# Fig 1E

```{r}
KFCS_age_inf_df  <- KFCS_get_prob_inf_at_age() |> filter(age_round >= 2) 

KFCS_age_bin_inf <- KFCS_age_inf_df |> mutate(age_bin = cut(age_round, 
                       breaks = breaks,
                       levels = levels)) |> group_by(age_bin) |> 
  summarise(n_infections  = sum(n_infections),
            n_individuals = sum(n_individuals)) |> 
  mutate(pct = n_infections / n_individuals,
         cohort = "KFCS")

KFCS_age_bin_inf <- KFCS_age_bin_inf |> add_binomial_CI() |> 
  mutate(country = "THA") |> 
  complete(age_bin, 
  cohort = factor(cohort_lvls, levels = cohort_lvls),
  fill   = list(pct = NA)) 

# Needs Inference.Rmd to be run
pred_df <- readRDS("./saved_objects/inference/one_dataset/pred.rds")[[1]] |> 
  mutate(cohort = "KFCS") |> 
  rename(age_bin = age)

fig_1E <- plot_1E(pred_df, KFCS_age_bin_inf)
fig_1E
```

# Fig 1F

```{r}
breaks <- c(0, 20, 40, 60, Inf)
labels <- c("0-19","20-39", "40-59", "60+")
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CPC_symp_age_bins <- CPC_get_prob_symp_inf() |> 
  filter(age >= 2) |> 
  group_symp_infection_in_bins(breaks, labels) |> 
  add_binomial_symp_CI() |> 
  mutate(cohort = "CPC")

x1 <- CPC_symp_age_bins |> slice(1) |> pull(pct_symp_given_age)

y1 <- CPC_symp_age_bins |> slice(2:3) |> 
  summarise(pct_symp_given_age = sum(n_symp) / sum(n_individuals)) |> pull(pct_symp_given_age)
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
KFCS_symp_age_bins <- KFCS_get_prob_symp_inf() |> 
  filter(age_round >= 2) |> 
  rename(age = age_round) |> 
  group_symp_infection_in_bins(breaks, labels) |> 
  add_binomial_symp_CI() |> 
  mutate(cohort  = "KFCS") 

x2 <- KFCS_symp_age_bins |> slice(1) |> pull(pct_symp_given_age)

y2 <- KFCS_symp_age_bins |> slice(2:3) |> summarise(pct_symp_given_age = sum(n_symp) / sum(n_individuals)) |> pull(pct_symp_given_age)
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
NMC_symp_age_bins <- NMC_get_prob_symp_inf() |> 
  filter(age >= 2) |> 
  group_symp_infection_in_bins(breaks, labels) |> 
  add_binomial_symp_CI() |> 
  mutate(cohort  = "NMC") 

x3 <- NMC_symp_age_bins |> slice(1) |> pull(pct_symp_given_age)
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
n_symp <- sum(CPC_symp_age_bins$n_symp) +
  sum(NMC_symp_age_bins$n_symp) + 
  sum(KFCS_symp_age_bins$n_symp)

avg_prob_symp_given_age_less_20 <- mean(c(x1, x2, x3)) |> round(3)

avg_prob_symp_given_age_20_50   <- mean(c(y1, y2)) |> round(3)

n_inf <- sum(CPC_symp_age_bins$n_infections) +
  sum(NMC_symp_age_bins$n_infections) +
  sum(KFCS_symp_age_bins$n_infections)

pct_symp <- n_symp / n_inf
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
prob_symp_age_df <- bind_rows(CPC_symp_age_bins, KFCS_symp_age_bins,
                              NMC_symp_age_bins)

fig_1F <- plot_1F(prob_symp_age_df)

fig_1F
```

```{r, fig.width = 10}
fig_1D_to_1F <- (fig_1D | fig_1E | fig_1F) +
    plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

fig_1D_to_1F
```

```{r}
fig_1A_to_1C <- (fig_1A | fig_1B | fig_1C) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.subtitle = element_blank())

ggsave(plot = fig_1A_to_1C, "./plots/fig1A_C.pdf", width = 10, height = 3,
       create.dir = TRUE)
```


```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6}
fig1 <- (fig_1A_to_1C / fig_1D_to_1F) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')

ggsave(plot = fig1, "./plots/fig1.png", width = 10, height = 6,
       create.dir = TRUE)
fig1
```
